'''matacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetophobia|chaetophobia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetophobia|chaetophobia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| matacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mætæchæth|mætæchæth]] || [[word:mætæchæj|mætæchæj]] || [[word:mætæchæsh|mætæchæsh]] || [[word:mætæchæ|mætæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:matatachath|matatachath]] || [[word:matatachaj|matatachaj]] || [[word:matatachash|matatachash]] || [[word:matatacha|matatacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:matachath|matachath]] || [[word:matachaj|matachaj]] || [[word:matachash|matachash]] || [[word:matacha|matacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:matafchath|matafchath]] || [[word:matafchaj|matafchaj]] || [[word:matafchash|matafchash]] || [[word:matafchaf|matafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:matachatha|matachatha]] || [[word:matachaja|matachaja]] || [[word:matachasha|matachasha]] || [[word:matachaka|matachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:matachath|matachath]] || [[word:matachaj|matachaj]] || [[word:matachash|matachash]] || [[word:matacha|matacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:matachathal|matachathal]] || [[word:matachajal|matachajal]] || [[word:matachashal|matachashal]] || [[word:matachakal|matachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:matachathatha|matachathatha]] || [[word:matachajaja|matachajaja]] || [[word:matachashasha|matachashasha]] || [[word:matachaka|matachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:matachathan|matachathan]] || [[word:matachajan|matachajan]] || [[word:matachashan|matachashan]] || [[word:matachakan|matachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:matachathaoro|matachathaoro]] || [[word:matachajaoro|matachajaoro]] || [[word:matachashaoro|matachashaoro]] || [[word:matachakaoro|matachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
